samples.title: Apple Pie
steps: Mix pie filling, sugar and milk
samples.formatted:
Apple Pie

Ingredients:
- cherry pie filling
- sugar
- milk
- graham crackers
- coconut
- pecans
- butter

Instructions:
1. Mix pie filling, sugar and milk
2. Add graham crumbs and pecans
3. Pour into 9 x 13-inch pan
4. Bake at 325 for 40 minutes
5. Remove from oven
6. Sprinkle with coconut and butter

samples.title: Apple Pie
steps: Mix sugar, pineapple, cherry pie filling, pecans and cream
Pour mixture into 9 x 13-inch pan; cover with preserves
samples.formatted:
Apple Pie

Ingredients:
- sugar
- pineapple
- cherry pie filling
- pecans
- whipping cream

Instructions:
1. Mix sugar, pineapple, cherry pie filling, pecans and cream
2. Chill until firm
3. Whip cream until stiff
4. Fold into gelatin mixture
5. Pour mixture into 9 x 13-inch pan; cover with preserves
6. Top with nuts and cherries
7. Makes 10 servings
